raw_consumer_statement: We have an apartment attached to our home. My mother has been staying there for a year. We have had many caregivers in and out Our Citi card was taken from our vehicle in the garage and used, by whom, we do not know. We have been on several trips in the recent months requiring caregivers around the clock We have charges on our card and items were delivered to our address. We have contacted many of the companies but they tell us the credit card company will reverse the charge The credit card will not recognize that we did not make or authorize the charges. The charges are on cards ending in XXXX and XXXX We had our card paid in full before we left in XX/XX/2024 so all charges made on those cards are fraud We contacted the police department but they referred us back to the card company Please help us
